headline: GAP ASSESSMENT OR FULL AUDIT?
subheading: A risk-based decision guide to choosing the right GMP starting point and spending budget where it counts
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial illustration on a fork-in-the-path concept, two diverging routes rendered as clean glowing lines across a deep navy background, one branch a swift focused arrow in fresh teal, the other a denser layered grid of overlapping translucent checklist panels and magnifier lenses in cyan suggesting deep systematic examination. Subtle floating abstract pharmaceutical motifs, frosted-glass cleanroom panels, polished stainless-steel surfaces catching cool light, faint vial silhouettes and a precise compliance checkmark dissolving into elegant bokeh. A single subtle fresh-green accent marks the chosen path. Calm, premium, precise mood evoking quality assurance, benchmarking versus verification, strategic decision-making, shallow depth of field, soft directional lighting from one side. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
